title: Infosys lifts FY26 revenue growth guidance after strong Q3
snippet: Investing.com --Infosysraised its full-yearrevenueoutlookafter reporting stronger-than-expected third-quarter results, supported by broad-based sequential growth, robust deal wins and ...
headline: Yahoo Finance
summary: Investing.com -- Infosys raised its full-year revenue outlook after reporting stronger-than-expected third-quarter results, supported by broad-based sequential growth, robust deal wins and improving demand signals, according to analysts. CEO Salil Parekh said the company’s enterprise AI work “is consistently driving higher market share,” adding that clients increasingly view Infosys as their “AI partner with demonstrated expertise.” Jefferies analyst Akshat Agarwal called the quarter an “all-round beat,” noting that revenues and normalised profit were ahead of estimates. Bank of America’s Kunal Tayal said the revenue guidance “implies a strong exit growth rate,” adding that it is an “organic revision.” He pointed to particularly strong performance in financial services and life sciences, with AI adoption among clients “going strong.” Infosys maintained its FY26 operating margin guidance of 20%–22%.
